title: Sanya Boat Rental: Costs, Seasons and Tips for 2026
html:
Sanya, on Hainan Island's southern coast, is a premier boating destination where you can explore the South China Sea from Sanya Marina. BoatHire24 lists boats from 150 to 6,000 EUR per day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Sanya?

Renting a boat in Sanya ranges from 50 EUR for a shared tour to 6,000 EUR for a crewed superyacht.

  • Shared sunset tour: 50, 80 EUR per person for 2 hours.
  • Small motorboat (half-day): 200, 400 EUR for up to 6 guests.
  • Catamaran full-day: 800, 1,500 EUR for up to 12 guests.
  • Luxury crewed yacht (full-day): 3,000, 6,000 EUR for up to 20 guests.

Sanya Marina and Half Moon Bay are popular departure points. Most operators include fuel, crew, and basic insurance. Always confirm what is included before you book a boat online.

Where to set off in Sanya

Sanya offers several marinas and bays from which to start your boating trip. Key departure points include Sanya Marina, Phoenix Island Marina, and Sanya International Yacht Club. You can also set off from Yalong Bay, Dadonghai Bay, or Haitang Bay. Each offers access to nearby islands such as Xidao Island and Wuzhizhou Island, which are 5 to 12 nautical miles offshore.

Which boat to rent

BoatHire24 lists a variety of boats to match your group size and budget.

  1. Axopar 28, fast and sporty, ideal for a day trip around Sanya Bay for up to 8 guests from 300 EUR.
  2. Lagoon 42 catamaran, spacious and stable, perfect for family outings in Yalong Bay for up to 10 guests from 800 EUR.
  3. Sunseeker Predator 55, luxurious and powerful, for sunset cruises to Xidao Island for up to 12 guests from 2,000 EUR.
  4. Maiora 26m, a flybridge motor yacht with full crew, ideal for multi-day charters around Wuzhizhou Island for up to 20 guests from 4,500 EUR. See the Maiora 26m for hire on BoatHire24.
  5. Azimut 55, elegant Italian style, suitable for special occasions in Haitang Bay for up to 14 guests from 2,500 EUR.

When is the best season for boating in Sanya?

The best months for boating in Sanya are October to April, when the northeast monsoon brings calm seas and clear skies. The high season runs from November to March, with peak demand around Chinese New Year (January/February). From May to September, the southwest monsoon brings higher humidity and afternoon showers, though trips are still possible. Always check the marine forecast.

For a quieter experience, visit in November: the sea is flat, the air is dry, and the water temperature remains a pleasant 24°C. Book your boat at least a week ahead during Chinese New Year.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Sanya?

To rent a bareboat (unskippered) boat in China, you generally need a valid boating licence recognised locally. Most renters on BoatHire24 choose a skippered charter, where the operator provides a qualified captain. The operator confirms the exact requirements for your nationality; licences from the UK, US, or ICC are often accepted for bareboat charter. To find available boats with or without a skipper, use the boat search and filter by your licence status.

At a glance

  • Price band: 50, 6,000 EUR per day
  • Peak months: November to March
  • Typical trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Maximum guests: up to 20 on crewed yachts
  • Currency: EUR (prices quoted in EUR)

Questions about boat rental in Sanya

Can I charter a yacht for a wedding or event in Sanya?

Several operators at Sanya Marina offer event-ready yachts with catering and decoration for up to 20 guests.

Is it safe to swim from a boat in Sanya?

Yes, many trips include stops at quiet coves around Xidao Island where swimming is allowed with crew supervision.

What if the weather turns bad during my trip?

Operators monitor conditions closely and may refund or reschedule if the trip is cancelled due to unsafe weather.

Can I bring my own food and drink on board?

Most charters allow you to bring your own provisions, though some luxury yachts include catering in the price.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Sanya or list your own. To become a host and earn from your boat, list it on check availability and set your own schedule. In 2026, Sanya continues to grow as a top boating destination in Asia.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Sanya and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
